4Pvxuq$$CEs8D;25]miF: Cz
* This feature is currently...<wait=0.4> locked..?<wait=0.5>
* Find the [[SECRET]] to unlock it...
* Kris,<wait=0.3> we have finally reached the top!
* Beyond this point lies King...<wait=0.4> a foe of pure terror!
* ...Wait,<wait=0.2> why is his intro sprite just a giant red question mark?

* Ummm... please pretend he looks intimidating!
Here he comes!
* So... you must be the so-called<wait=0.5> "LIGHTERS"<wait=0.2>..?
* Do not look at me like that.
* Yes, I am a giant red question mark.
* It is a... <wait=0.3> very intimidating fashion statement in the Dark World!
* ...What do you mean it looks like a placeholder?!
* Well..-
* SILENCE!
* I WILL SHOW YOU JUST HOW GENUINE MY TERROR IS!
* Kris,<wait=0.3> it's getting really loud down here...
* It sounds like...<wait=0.4> a carousel spinning out of control!
* Wait,<wait=0.2> the floor is moving!!
* Hold onto your hats everyone!
* CHAOS,<wait=0.1> CHAOS!<wait=0.2> UNLESS YOU LIKED THE CALM,<wait=0.1> CALM!
* SEE MY LOVELY SPADES?<wait=0.2> THEY LIKE YOU VERY MUCH!
* SO MUCH THAT THEY WILL FLY STRAIGHT AT YOUR LITTLE HEART!
* ISN'T THAT NICE?<wait=0.2> SO FRIENDLY,<wait=0.1> FRIENDLY!
* ...Hey, that's completely unfair!
* Sounds like a target practice to me.
* UEE HEE HEE!<wait=0.2> SHARK-TO-SHARK!<wait=0.2> I WOULDN'T HAVE IT ANY OTHER WAY!
* BOUNCING, SPINNING, WINNING! LET THE GAME BEGIN!

Controls inverted for the next attack.

8-Zu[8FMP*a%ggq(LOu%: I will tear your SOUL to pieces!

VALUE: NO MORE ROUNDS. NO MORE TURNS. PERISH!
Do you still find me amusing, Lightners?!
No more technical difficulties. Only destruction!
I will crush you into literal pixels!
Quiet! Your dialogue cannot save you now!
Why do you refuse to kneel?!
I am the King of this world! You are NOTHING!
I will tear your SOUL to pieces!
